query: SELECT id, customerName, jobDate, LEFT(customerNotes, 100) as notes_preview, LEFT(checklistItems, 200) as checklist_preview FROM cleanerJobs WHERE customerNotes IS NOT NULL AND customerNotes != '' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
